[Style: illustration] Bold stylized illustration with confident shapes and strong silhouettes. Clean color palette with purposeful choices. Editorial or children's book quality. Distinctive artistic voice.
[Restrictions] No photographic realism. No generic clip-art style. No text unless specified. No busy backgrounds that compete with the subject.
